## Two-consumer check

Mobile Surfaces follows a two-consumer rule: a new abstraction lands only when two real call sites in this repo need it. If your request adds an abstraction (helper, contract field, adapter slot, config knob), name the two consumers below or explain why it should be an exception.

- Consumer 1:
- Consumer 2:

## Non-goals check

This request is not on the [Non-Goals](../../README.md#non-goals) list (Android, SwiftUI-only starter, add-to-existing-repo patcher, production push service / backend, MCP runtime, multi-tenant theming, replacing the local ActivityKit module before v0, anchoring on alpha `expo-widgets`, broadcast push).
